name: Rogue Researcher
text: An AI researcher published a paper describing a major training efficiency improvement. Three groups replicated the results within a week. The treaty's FLOP thresholds, calibrated to older methods, no longer capture dangerous training runs.
image-prompt: A lone scientist in a dark lab illuminated only by multiple monitor screens showing neural network diagrams, they are uploading a paper to the internet, ominous red glow, thriller atmosphere, digital painting, no text
